mapper.select: SELECT b.*, m.nickname FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.member_id WHERE b.board_type = 'COMMUNITY'
SELECT b.*, m.nickname FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.member_id WHERE (b.title LIKE #{pattern} OR b.content LIKE #{pattern}) AND b.status = 'Y' AND b.recipe_id IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ingredient( ingredient_name, quantity, unit, recipe_id ) VALUES( #{ingredient_name}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{recipe_id} )

INSERT INTO board( member_id, title, content, recipe_id, status, board_type )
VALUES( #{member_id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{recipe_id}, #{status}, #{board_type} )
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, m.nickname FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.member_id WHERE b.board_id = #{board_id}

select b.*, m.nickname, ( select count(*) from comment c where b.board_id = c.board_id ) AS comment_count from board b join member m on b.member_id = m.member_id left join comment c on b.board_id = c.board_id where 1=1
and( m.nickname like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or b.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and status = #{status}
order by b.created_date asc
order by b.created_date desc
order by b.view_count desc
limit #{size} offset #{offset}
